actionUnits.condition: Manual validation of the win condition path for Scoremanager (MonoBehaviour GUID f7de224e5fee443418417f9f2bfa2998; scene overrides set winAmount=4 via PrefabInstance; MonoBehaviour component fileID likely 738895513262049452). Since Scoremanager.changescore(int) cannot be invoked by the Trigger action (parametered method), directly trigger the referenced WinLose.Winlevel when score would equal winAmount. This covers the event path that Scoremanager would call automatically when score == winAmount.
